dsl_rule.translation_notes: Signal uses 'exponential smoothing trendline' which maps to EMA. Selected ema_20 as a reasonable intermediate-term exponential moving average for trend following. The signal is context-dependent (both long and short entries), so both entry_long/exit_long and entry_short/exit_short are populated with mirror conditions. Exit conditions are reversal-based: long exits when price crosses below the trendline, short exits when price crosses above it.

backtest_rule.reason: Signal uses 'exponential smoothing trendline' which maps to EMA. Selected ema_20 as a reasonable intermediate-term exponential moving average for trend following. The signal is context-dependent (both long and short entries), so both entry_long/exit_long and entry_short/exit_short are populated with mirror conditions. Exit conditions are reversal-based: long exits when price crosses below the trendline, short exits when price crosses above it.

source_rule_text: Buy when prices move above the exponential smoothing trendline; sell when prices move below it.
